case_title: VICENTE LOPEZ VS. NELLY RAMIREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VICENTE LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NELLY RAMIREZ AND SAUL RAMIREZ ARE PRESENT, ASSISTED BY JEAN GARASCIA, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
